rule_metadata.name: LyncSniper
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'LyncSniper' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule LyncSniper
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'LyncSniper' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "LyncSniper"
		rule_category = "offensive_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = "LyncSniper" nocase ascii wide

	condition:
		any of them
}
